name: astros-from-fixture
goal: Build a two-step data pipeline: (1) Read the local fixture file astros.json, which has the schema {"number": int, "people": [{"name": str, "craft": str}, ...], "message": str}. (2) Extract the astronaut count from the 'number' field and write 'There are currently N astronauts in space.' to summary.txt, where N is that integer (no leading zeros, no extra punctuation around N).

checks.pattern: There are currently \d+ astronauts in space\.

notes.purpose: Tier 1 fixture-driven replacement for the retired live-data-pipeline case (audit §2 flagged the open-notify.org dependency as inherently flaky). Same multi-step pipeline shape, deterministic input.
